totp_label: Enter TOTP code or recovery code
totp_recovery_hint: Phone not available? Enter a recovery code instead.
recovery_subtitle: Save these codes in a secure location
recovery_warning: Each code can only be used once. Without these codes and without the authenticator app, login is not possible.
setup_2fa_scan_hint: Scan the QR code with an authenticator app (e.g. Apple Passwords, Google Authenticator, Authy)
dash_notes_empty: No notes yet — click + to add
dash_notes_placeholder: Type and click outside to save…
settings_language_hint: Change takes effect after reloading the page.
reauth_2fa_prompt: Enter your password or a current 2FA code to confirm:
trips_filter_location: Filter by geofence location (start or destination) — across all time ranges
trips_batch_hint: Tip: Select "All", deselect exceptions, then assign purpose via quick button
trips_merge_note: The two trips will be combined into one.
trip_detail_retag_desc: Re-detect destination/purpose based on end coordinates:
trip_detail_split_desc: Did the detector miss a stop? Split this trip into two at the chosen point.
trip_detail_split_hint: Tap a point on the map or use the time slider.
trip_detail_split_no_data: No telemetry data available to split.
charges_record_hint: e.g. DC fast charger on the road — Vehicle:
charges_col_wh_per_km_hint: Consumption vs. average — green = lower, red = higher, red border = implausible
charges_wpk_flag_low: Suspect: charge missing since previous session
charges_incomplete_hint: Incomplete data — odometer/SoC are backfilled by the worker processes
charges_no_sessions: No charge sessions yet. Webhook URL for Home Assistant:
charge_detail_incomplete: Incomplete data — odometer and SoC are backfilled by the worker processes.
charge_detail_backfill_hint: Manually entered values are kept across recalculation; the worker only fills fields left empty.
charge_detail_edit_warn: Edit mode — Only use for technical data gaps (e.g. Home Assistant outage). Manual changes may distort cost calculations.
journeys_select_range: Select date range to load trips
journeys_no_trips_in_range: No trips in this date range
journeys_required_fields: Title, From and To are required
journey_detail_gpx_desc: Export all GPS tracks of this journey as GPX file (for QGIS, Google Earth etc.)
journey_detail_delete_desc: Permanently delete this journey (trips will be preserved):
journey_detail_coords_only: Start/end points only (no GPS track available)
analysis_select_range: Select date range to load analysis
analysis_no_charge_cycles: No charge cycles — no wallbox meter reading recorded
analysis_no_charge_sessions: No charge sessions in selected period
analysis_no_range_data: No trips with consumption data (min. 20 km)
analysis_soh_charges_hint: More data needed for trend calculation
analysis_soh_charges_no_data: No charges with ≥ 50% SoC delta recorded yet.
analysis_yearly_no_data: No trips recorded in the current year yet.
analysis_yearly_hint: Extrapolation: {0} days since first trip ({2}), {1} days until year end. Factor {3}x — independent of the current filter.
analysis_map_alltime_hint: Map shows the entire period (date filter does not apply here)
print_recon_warn_tip: Printing blocked: for this billing period the total does not match the meter readings (over- or under-count ≠ 0). Admin must check the charge readings in the Gaps tab.
print_recon_ok: Billing verified — total matches the meter readings (±0 kWh difference).
print_excluded: Session IDs: {0} belong to a different vehicle and are not billed here.
print_note_end_next_day: * End time on the following day (charge continued past midnight).
print_stats_hint: Based on recorded charge sessions at the charging station and the kilometers driven in between.
print_stats_ext_hint: Includes manually recorded external charges (DC fast chargers etc.). Distance from trips, € from flat rate + external receipts.
print_stats_no_ext: No external charges recorded for this month.
print_stats_tariff_compare: Tariff comparison: home charging avg {0} ct/kWh, external charges avg {1} ct/kWh. Differential for {2} kWh home-charged energy: {3} €.
ha_export_desc: Serves the latest values of selected vehicles over a token-protected API. The 'IDMate Telemetry' Home Assistant integration reads them via base URL + token. Vehicles whose data originates in Home Assistant: simply leave unchecked (no loopback).
ha_export_url_hint: Use the server's LAN IP, e.g. http://192.168.x.y:3004 — Home Assistant must reach this address directly (not the external domain). Empty = auto from the current access URL.
admin_teslamate_desc: Import historical drives and charges from a TeslaMate Postgres database. Enable via TESLAMATE_PG_URL in docker-compose.yml.
admin_teslamate_no_mapping_warn: Please map at least one TeslaMate car first.
admin_teslamate_positions_desc: TeslaMate positions vs. IDmate InfluxDB per day — gives an order-of-magnitude estimate of the import volume. Filters (20-second density + dedup) are applied during the actual import.
admin_teslamate_no_positions: No positions in the selected period.
admin_teslamate_compare_desc: Spot check: first 25 + last 25 samples of the day from both sources. Plausibility check validates range + data type of all numeric fields.
admin_teslamate_import_desc: Background import of TM positions into InfluxDB (20s density filter, ±20s dedup against existing data, plausibility check). Newest days first. Pauses itself on errors.
admin_teslamate_import_restart_paused: Paused after container restart — please resume explicitly.
admin_teslamate_charges_desc: Import TM charging processes as external sessions (is_external=1). Duplicates with same plate + start time ±15min are skipped.
admin_teslamate_reassign_desc: If TM charges were imported to the wrong vehicle: move all TM imports from one plate to another.
admin_teslamate_reassign_confirm: Move all TM charges from {0} to {1}?
admin_gaps_desc: Manual mileage entries for periods without telemetry data (e.g. cell-network gaps, pre-telemetry phase). Each entry is saved as its own trip.
admin_gaps_none: No gaps detected — all mileage is recorded contiguously.
trips_short_hidden: {0} short trips (< 1 km) hidden — likely log gaps.
admin_telemetry_stick_battery_desc: ESP32 battery level per telemetry stick. Gaps indicate offline periods.
admin_telemetry_data_volume_desc: Estimated telemetry traffic per hour, stacked by device.
admin_telemetry_carrier_coverage_desc: Signal strength per carrier on map. Dot size = sample count, brightness = CSQ.
admin_rd_range_hint: Load all readings in the time range directly (even on broken sessions) — delete/edit/add individually, then Save & Rebuild.
admin_rd_gap: Gap: {0} kWh missing vs. previous row's meter end
admin_rd_overlap: Overlap: {0} kWh vs. previous row's meter end (duplicate?)
admin_rd_gaps_marked: {0} row(s) with a meter jump marked
admin_rd_paste_hint: Columns from the timestamp on in this order (tab-separated, as copied from Google Sheets/Excel): Timestamp, Vehicle, Meter start, Meter end, kWh, Price, Base fee, Odometer, SoC. Units (kWh, €), a leading ID column and a header row are stripped automatically; empty cells allowed (keep the tabs).
admin_import_trips_columns: CSV file (comma-separated) with the following columns:
admin_import_trips_hint: Coordinates with comma as decimal separator in quotes. SOC and Temp optional.
admin_import_charges_hint: Numbers with comma as decimal separator. Auto, Verbrauch_kWh required.
admin_delete_trips_desc: Deletes all trips of the active vehicle with ID from/to (inclusive). Useful before re-importing CSV.
admin_delete_charges_desc: Deletes all charge readings with ID from/to (inclusive). Sessions will be rebuilt afterwards.
admin_gpx_import_desc: Import GPX files (hikes, bike tours etc.). Tracks are saved as trips and displayed on the map.
admin_rescan_desc: Retrieve missing trips from InfluxDB. Duplicates will be skipped.
admin_map_style_note: Server default for Dashboard, Trip and Journey maps. Users can pick their own style in their profile.
admin_invoice_desc: Default texts for the print view of the charge cost invoice. HTML allowed (<br> for line break).
admin_invoice_encrypted: Personal fields are stored encrypted in the database.
admin_geocode_desc: Geocode missing addresses (individual addresses can be deleted in the trip log).
admin_recompute_desc: Recomputes kWh + consumption for all trips using the battery capacity that applied at each trip's time (rolling 90-day estimate from charges).
admin_calib_desc: Determines the AC charging-loss factor from a vehicle with a known capacity (ideally new, ~no degradation). The estimate is calibrated to the entered anchor value — the factor then applies to all internal/external AC charges.
admin_session_start_desc: Start number for automatic charge sessions
admin_billed_until_desc: Charges up to and including this date count as billed and are NEVER changed by any rebuild (not even a full rebuild). Set manually after each billing. Empty = no lock.
admin_meter_gaps_desc: The wallbox meter is cumulative. Whenever there is a jump from one session's final meter reading to the next session's first reading, energy was charged whose underlying readings are no longer in IDmate. Shows total + list.
admin_js_meter_gaps_none: No gaps — all readings are present
admin_cgaps_desc: Missing charges (meter jump between sessions) and holes within a session. With before/after context — click a gap to backfill it.
admin_cgaps_still_open: Readings saved, but the gap is still open — the entered meter values don't connect seamlessly to the sessions before/after. Please check meter start/end.
admin_cgaps_frozen: This period is frozen as billed (cutoff {0}). The rebuild won't touch it. Set the billing cutoff (Admin → Charges) before the gap date, then backfill again.
admin_cgaps_ref_before: Last row before (your first row must connect here)
admin_cgaps_ref_after: First row after (your last row must connect here)
admin_cgaps_paste_hint: Tab-separated rows — columns: Date  Vehicle  Meter-Start  Meter-End  kWh  Price  Base-fee  km  SoC
admin_rebuild_desc: Delete existing sessions and rebuild from InfluxDB + external charges.
admin_dedup_desc: Removes exact duplicate readings (same timestamp + vehicle + meter values) that can pile up from repeated backfills, and recalculates affected sessions (billed ones stay protected).
admin_dedup_confirm:
Removes exact duplicate readings (keeps one each) and recalculates afterwards.

Billed charges (before the cutoff) are left untouched. Continue?
admin_relink_desc: Finds readings whose session was deleted (stuck on a dead session id, showing neither in a session nor as 'unassigned'), frees them and rebuilds the affected charge.
admin_relink_none: No orphaned readings found — all clean.
admin_relink_blocked: Found {0} orphaned readings, but they are BEFORE the billing cutoff ({1}) and frozen. Lower the cutoff (Admin → Charges) before that date and repair again.
admin_rebuild_confirm:
Rebuilds all automatic charges AFTER {0} from the readings.

Protected: all charges up to {0} (billed), external charges, and manual corrections (location, cost, note, km, SoC).

Continue?
admin_rebuild_confirm_nocutoff:
WARNING: No billing cutoff is set.

This recalculates ALL charges — including already billed ones — and session numbers may change.

Recommended: set a cutoff (billed until) above first. Continue anyway?
admin_recalc_distances_desc: Recalculate session numbers and km distances (fast, no rebuild).
admin_detect_external_desc: Search InfluxDB for charges that did not occur at the home location.
admin_add_external_desc: e.g. manually enter DC fast charger on the road
admin_reassign_desc: Charges assigned to the wrong vehicle can be corrected here.
admin_js_reassign_no_selection: Please select charges and target vehicle
admin_charge_geofences_desc: Charge geofences are used for automatic location assignment of charge sessions. They take priority over general locations.
admin_operators_desc: Operators (e.g. Tesla, IONITY) with custom icon and color. Charge locations inherit icon and color from the assigned operator.
admin_routes_desc: Automatic trip purpose assignment: From/To can be set to a location or to "(any)". Exact rules (From+To) take priority over wildcard rules.
admin_vehicles_desc: Assign a vehicle a Drives filter (telemetry/trips) and a Charges filter (charge tracker).
admin_capacity_no_data: Not enough charging data in the last 30 days
admin_capacity_auto_tooltip: Trend estimate (today's value on the degradation line) from {n_used} charges, {n_recon} stuck-SoC corrected · click for history + details
admin_default_vehicle_desc: Restored after login and after 1 hour of inactivity. The header picker only switches temporarily for 1h.
admin_own_security_hint: Your own password, avatar and 2FA settings are now under
admin_delete_warning: This value will be removed from all trips!
admin_delete_confirm_text: To delete {0}, type the name to confirm:
admin_click_map: Click on the map to set the position
admin_visits_count: Visits: {0} · Drag marker to change position
admin_no_operators_hint: No operators created yet — add them in the "Operators" tab.
admin_influx_no_devices: ⚠ No devices found in InfluxDB — check token/bucket
admin_js_name_position_required: Name and position (click on map) required
admin_js_geofence_reassigned: {0} trip starts and {1} trip ends assigned to geofence
admin_js_geofence_reassigned_charges: {0} charging sessions, {1} trip starts and {2} trip ends assigned to geofence
admin_js_confirm_delete_trips: Really delete all trips with ID {0} to {1}?
admin_js_confirm_delete_readings: Really delete all charge readings with ID {0} to {1}?
admin_js_select_date_range: Please select From and To date
admin_js_min_polygon_points: At least 3 points for a polygon
profile_avatar_hint: PNG, JPG or WEBP — the cropped area is resized to 128×128.
profile_avatar_editor_hint: Drag to move — use the slider, mouse wheel or pinch to zoom.
profile_map_style_hint: Applies only to you. Without a selection the server default from the admin settings is used.
profile_2fa_desc: Protect your account with a TOTP authenticator.
admin_tags_own_only_hint: Tip: You can only rename or delete tags you created yourself. New tags appear automatically once they're used on your vehicle.
admin_user_vehicles_hint: No selection = all vehicles visible. Otherwise the user only sees the ticked ones.
admin_carrier_filter_hint: Tip: Tap a carrier to show only its coverage — tap again to show all.
err_invalid_image_format: Invalid format (allowed: PNG, JPG, WEBP, GIF)
charge_only_external_deletable: Only external sessions can be deleted
admin_err_only_own_tags: You can only edit tags you created yourself — otherwise ask an admin.
trip_split_manual_no_track: Manual trips without a track cannot be split
trip_split_point_range: Split point must be between start and end
login_too_many_attempts_relogin: Too many attempts. Please sign in again.
pw_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters long
pw_not_only_digits: Password must not consist of digits only
pw_min_distinct: Password must contain at least 3 different characters
err_from_or_to_required: At least origin or destination required
err_route_rule_exists: Rule for this route already exists
